name: claude-team-toolkit
description: Team-ready Claude Code skill pack with 11 integrations: Trello, Azure DevOps, Heroku, Sentry, Slack, AWS S3, PostgreSQL, RSpec, Brakeman, bundler-audit, k6. Multi-account profile support, audit logging, security-first defaults. For dev, QA, QC, testers, and team leads.
author: tuannv14
